name: founder-os
description: Evidence-backed operating workflows for a solo founder managing multiple products.

interface.shortDescription: Run portfolio reviews, activation reads, finance checks, and private HQ publishing.
interface.longDescription: Founder OS packages the repeatable Agentic OS workflows used to choose the next move, review product evidence, measure activation, inspect costs, and keep Portfolio HQ trustworthy.
defaultPrompt: What is the single best next move?
